runs.label: RAG Wikipedia only
runs.note: Only RAG Wikipedia article in knowledge base. Answer relevancy could not be scored.

runs.label: Added Cross-Encoder + BM25 docs
runs.note: Added SBERT cross-encoder docs, Prompt Injection Wikipedia, and Ragas metrics docs.

runs.label: Expanded knowledge base (6 docs)
runs.note: Added Cache Computing Wikipedia. Context precision peaked but recall dropped — BM25 corpus re-fit bug discovered.

runs.label: BM25 incremental fix applied
runs.note: Fixed BM25 corpus accumulation bug (was re-fitting on latest batch only, discarding prior IDF). Context recall improved.

faithfulness.name: Faithfulness
faithfulness.description: Are all claims in the answer supported by the retrieved context? Measures hallucination — 1.0 means every statement is grounded.

answer_relevancy.name: Answer Relevancy
answer_relevancy.description: Does the answer actually address the question? Ragas generates synthetic questions from the answer and measures cosine similarity to the original question.

context_precision.name: Context Precision
context_precision.description: Are the retrieved chunks useful? Measures the fraction of retrieved chunks that actually contain information needed to answer the question.

context_recall.name: Context Recall
context_recall.description: Does the retrieved context cover the ground-truth answer? Checks how many facts from the expected answer appear in the retrieved chunks.
context_recall.formula: # ground-truth statements in context / # total ground-truth statements
